title: xanthophyllum manickamii
intro: Xanthophyllum manickamii is a species of flowering plant in the family Polygalaceae, commonly known as the xanthophyllum plant. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its leaves, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The leaves of Xanthophyllum manickamii are rich in antioxidants and have been found to exhibit anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of fever, cough, and respiratory issues. The plant is often prepared as a herbal tea or decoction by boiling its leaves in water, which can be used to treat a range of health problems, including colds, flu, and digestive issues.
